rules.name: Ink Replacement Alert
rules.recommendation: Printer ink/toner level is below 15%. Prepare replacement cartridge immediately to prevent incomplete print runs.

rules.name: Printer Maintenance Interval
rules.recommendation: Printer has printed over 10,000 pages since last check. Run printhead cleaning cycles to maintain professional quality.

rules.name: High Workload Strain
rules.recommendation: Daily queue has exceeded 50 prints. Spread jobs across multiple printers to prevent overheating issues.
